7 // -*- C++ -*-
8 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_STATE_H
9 #define ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_STATE_H
10 /* Author : desrozis at Tue Nov 6 15:11:02 2012
11  * Generated by createNew
12  */
13 
14 /*
15  * \ingroup Law
16  * \brief Outils pour l'�valuation point � point des fonctions
17  *
18  * Le state est une base de donn�es de propri�t�s et de valeurs associ�es
19  *
20  * \code
21  * ScalarRealProperty P_1(0,"P_1");
22  * ScalarRealProperty P_2(1,"P_2");
23  * VectorialRealProperty P_3(2,"P_3",2);
24  *
25  * Real r_1, r_2;
26  * RealArray r_3(P_3.size());
27  *
28  * State s;
29  *
30  * s.reserve(3);
31  *
32  * s << In_1 << In_2 << In_3;
33  *
34  * s[P_1] = r_1;
35  * s[P_2] = r_2;
36  * s[P_3] = r_3; // Par r�f�rence ...
37  * s[P_3].copy(r_3); // ... ou par copie
38  *
39  * info() << s;
40  * \endcode
41  *
42  */
43 
44 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law1/Property.h"
45 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law1/PropertyVector.h"
46 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law1/ContainerTraits.h"
47 
48 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
49 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
50 
51 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE;
52 
53 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
54 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
55 
56 namespace details {
57 
58  // Fonctions pour le redimensionnement des donn�es
59  // Utile pour �tre g�n�rique
60  // Cas scalaire, on ne fait rien
61  template<typename T>
62  void resize_if_necessary(const PropertyT<eScalar,T>& p, T& a) {}
63  // Cas vectoriel, on dimension � la taille de la propri�t�
64  template<typename T>
65  void resize_if_necessary(const PropertyT<eVectorial,T>& p, Array<T>& a)
66  {
67  a.resize(p.size());
68  }
69 
70  /*
71  * \brief Classe interne g�n�rique g�rant un type de propri�t� (Scalaire/vectorielle)
72  *
73  */
74  template<typename P>
75  class PartialStateT
76  {
77  public:
78 
79  typedef typename StateContainer<P>::ValueType ValueType;
80  typedef ValueType& ReferenceType;
81 
82  public:
83 
84  PartialStateT() {}
85 
87  PartialStateT<P>& operator<<(const P& p) {
88  m_properties << p;
89  m_values.resize(m_properties.size());
90  resize_if_necessary(p, m_values[m_properties[p]]);
91  return *this;
92  }
93 
95  void reserve(const Integer size)
96  {
97  m_values.reserve(size);
98  }
99 
101  ReferenceType operator[](const P& p)
102  {
103  _check(p);
104  return m_values[m_properties[p]];
105  }
106 
108  bool contains(const P& p) const
109  {
110  return m_properties.contains(p);
111  }
112 
114  const PropertyVector& properties() const { return m_properties; }
115 
117  const Array<ValueType>& values() const { return m_values; }
118 
119  private:
120 
121  void _check(const P& p) const
122  {
123  if(not m_properties.contains(p))
124  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException(String::format("Property '{0}' not registered in state",p.name()));
125  }
126 
127  private:
128 
130  PropertyVector m_properties;
131 
133  SharedArray<ValueType> m_values;
134  };
135 
136 }
137 
138 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
139 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
140 
141 /*
142  * \brief Classe State pour l'�valuation des lois
143  *
144  * Le traitement des propri�t�s scalaires/vectorielles a �t� s�par� et le choix se fait statiquement
145  * par le type de propri�t�s
146  *
147  */
148 class State
149  : protected details::PartialStateT<ScalarRealProperty>
150  , protected details::PartialStateT<ScalarIntegerProperty>
151  , protected details::PartialStateT<ScalarBooleanProperty>
152  , protected details::PartialStateT<VectorialRealProperty>
153  , protected details::PartialStateT<VectorialIntegerProperty>
154  , protected details::PartialStateT<VectorialBooleanProperty>
155 {
156 public:
157 
158  State() {}
159 
161  void reserve(const Integer size)
162  {
163  details::PartialStateT<ScalarRealProperty>::reserve(size);
164  details::PartialStateT<ScalarIntegerProperty>::reserve(size);
165  details::PartialStateT<ScalarBooleanProperty>::reserve(size);
166  details::PartialStateT<VectorialRealProperty>::reserve(size);
167  details::PartialStateT<VectorialIntegerProperty>::reserve(size);
168  details::PartialStateT<VectorialBooleanProperty>::reserve(size);
169  }
170 
171  template<typename P>
172  State& operator<<(const P& p) {
173  m_properties << p;
174  details::PartialStateT<P>::operator<<(p);
175  return *this;
176  }
177 
178  template<typename P>
179  typename details::PartialStateT<P>::ReferenceType operator[](const P& p)
180  {
181  m_properties << p;
182  return details::PartialStateT<P>::operator[](p);
183  }
184 
185  template<typename P>
186  bool contains(const P& p) const
187  {
188  return details::PartialStateT<P>::contains(p);
189  }
190 
191  const PropertyVector& properties() const { return m_properties; }
192 
193 private:
194 
195  // Ensemble des propri�t�s du state
196  PropertyVector m_properties;
197 
198  friend std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& nout, const State& s);
199 };
200 
201 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
202 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
203 
204 #define SCALAR(type) details::PartialStateT<Scalar##type##Property>
205 #define VECTORIAL(type) details::PartialStateT<Vectorial##type##Property>
206 
207 #define PRINT_INFO(type) \
208  { \
209  const PropertyVector& properties = s.SCALAR(type)::properties(); \
210  for(Integer ip = 0; ip < properties.size(); ++ip) { \
211  const Property& p = properties[ip]; \
212  const Integer i = properties[p]; \
213  nout << "\nscalar['" << p.name() << "']=" << s.SCALAR(type) ::values()[i] << " "; \
214  empty = false; \
215  } \
216  } \
217  { \
218  const PropertyVector& properties = s. VECTORIAL(type) ::properties(); \
219  for(Integer ip = 0; ip < properties.size(); ++ip) { \
220  const Property& p = properties[ip]; \
221  const Integer i = properties[p]; \
222  nout << "\nvectorial['" << p.name() << "']={" << s. VECTORIAL(type) ::values()[i] << "}"; \
223  empty = false; \
224  } \
225  }
226 
227 // Pour le debug
228 inline std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& nout, const State& s)
229 {
230  nout << "State : ";
231 
232  bool empty = true;
233 
234  PRINT_INFO(Real);
235  PRINT_INFO(Integer);
236  PRINT_INFO(Boolean);
237 
238  if(empty) nout << "empty!";
239 
240  return nout;
241 }
242 
243 #undef SCALAR
244 #undef VECTORIAL
245 #undef PRINT_INFO
246 
247 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
248 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
249 
250 END_LAW_NAMESPACE
251 
252 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
253 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
254 
255 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_STATE_H */
